text:
The new RM 55-01 Manual Winding is available in three versions : Carbon TPT®, White Quartz TPT® and Grey Quartz TPT®. These technical composites, used for the bezels, offer excellent shock and scratch resistance while reducing the overall weight of the watch. The materials’ unfinished damascene effect harmonises with the taut, clean lines of the three-part tonneau case. The calibre is securely anchored by four spline screws in microblasted titanium, framed with satin-finished pillars and polished bezels. The microblasted and rhodium-plated hands glide above a complex four-part flange that weaves together titanium, carbon fibre, and steel in a play of texture and relief.

📸 Fabien Nissels

The new RM 55-01 calibre, the RMUL4, is built on a grade 5 titanium baseplate., an alloy borrowed from the aerospace industry and highly prized at Richard Mille. To enhance its aesthetics, the baseplate is microblasted, sanded and treated with a black PVD coating. The going train is affixed by three bridges also produced from grade 5 titanium sanded and treated with Titalyt®. Nonetheless, working with this material remains a constant challenge. Milling grade 5 titanium is a herculean task: its extreme hardness and the brand’s low tolerance for error take a toll on every tool. The same uncompromising standards hold for the slightly thicker satin-brushed parts that structure the movement and highlight a tension between straight lines and curves.

🎥 @milledollars

‘Perfection is achieved, not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.’ The RM 55-01 Manual Winding fully illustrates this dictum from pilot and author Antoine de Saint-Exupéry.With its new ultralight Calibre RMUL4, the RM 55-01 takes a fundamental of the brand to new realms with sublime skeletonisation. Weighing less than 5 grams, this titanium movement is carefully designed to elegantly fit within a case of conservative dimensions (37.95 x 10.75 x 47.33 mm), while optimising both wrist comfort and visual balance. Furthermore, the choice of a manual winding system fulfils this clear desire for a lighter build. Without obstruction from an oscillating weight, light flows freely through the movement.

📸 Fabien Nissels

The proportions of the new RM 55-01 in white Quartz TPT® have been carefully refined to optimise both comfort and aesthetics, resulting in a timepiece that remains discreet on the wrist while captivating through its exceptional level of detail and skeletonisation.

🎥 @dppiimages

Grey Quartz TPT® seals the case of the new RM 55-01. Its damascened pattern, inherent to this material, enhances the pure, curved lines of the tripartite tonneau-shaped case. Combined with a titanium caseband, they ensure optimal resistance to everyday shocks while controlling the overall weight of the watch.

🎥 @dppiimages

The new RM 55-01 Manual Winding in Carbon TPT® is a watch that makes no concessions in its radical aesthetic, a streamlined titanium calibre and a design that is both sporty and purposeful.

🎥 @dppiimages

At Richard Mille, there are certain models that find their sweet spot in extreme understatement, focalising all the technicity of contemporary haute horlogerie into an architecture stripped down to absolute mechanical necessity. The new RM 55-01 Manual Winding fully ascribes to this approach, projecting a resolutely airy structure where each component is perfectly situated according to its function.

🎥 @pouponpoupon

Suspended between silence and tension, the new RM 55-01 embodies an inner odyssey, that of time laid bare. Never empty, space becomes the very place where time is born, immune to gravity.

🎥 @milledollars

The new RM 55-01 Manual Winding exudes subtle understatement, but reveals captivating mechanical presence close up, where every component in titanium asserts its purpose within a finely orchestrated architecture.

📸 @pouponpoupon

@iliatopuria, new Richard Mille partner and current UFC Lightweight Champion, is one of the most explosive talents in modern mixed martial arts. His resilience, composure, and humility make him a fighter in the noblest sense of the discipline. Combining elite boxing with relentless grappling pressure, El Matador’s success is the result of relentless training, countless hours spent preparing both body and mind for the few minutes in the cage that can define his future.

📸 @odieuxboby

El Matador, @iliatopuria, enters the great family of Richard Mille partners. Rewriting the UFC history books, the current world champion at Featherweight and Lightweight knows where he comes from and where he wants to go. Ilia is the first combat sports star to partner with Richard Mille. The 29-year-old fighter’s quiet precision matches the brand’s understated technicality. “I feel a lot of pride, because it’s huge—not only for me, but for the entire fighting world.”

📸 @odieuxboby

Discipline defines @iliatopuria, the new Richard Mille partner. He combines an elite mindset, built on composed emotional control, with a powerful fighting style that has defined his identity and taken him to the very top of the sport. A rise in power that serves a single purpose: self happiness.

🎥 @milledollars
